violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Bottom on all reach-ins need to be cleaned of crumbs - Doors on reach-in freezer for ice cream cakes needs to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. - by dishwasher had a bucket in the sink

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -by dishwasher had no soap--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. - by dishwasher had no paper towels.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Hole in walk-in freezer needs to be repaired. Currently insulation is exposed

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Ceiling tiles in kitchen need cleaned, dusty. - Kickplates need to be cleaned. - Floors under equipment and under shelves need to be cleaned. - Floors in walk-in cooler and freezer need to be cleaned.
